classData.comment:
/**
 * @summary Ingests the physical Neo project structure into Native Graph nodes.
 *
 * Scans the filesystem dynamically before REM sleep to guarantee the memory-core
 * never hallucinates against stale Codebase structures. Maps files as 'FILE' nodes
 * and folders as 'DIRECTORY', establishing hierarchical 'CONTAINS' edges natively.
 *
 * @class Neo.ai.services.memory-core.FileSystemIngestor
 * @extends Neo.core.Base
 * @singleton
 */
classData.summary:
Ingests the physical Neo project structure into Native Graph nodes.

Scans the filesystem dynamically before REM sleep to guarantee the memory-core
never hallucinates against stale Codebase structures. Maps files as 'FILE' nodes
and folders as 'DIRECTORY', establishing hierarchical 'CONTAINS' edges natively.
classData.name: FileSystemIngestor

classData.description: Standard high-noise directories and files to completely ignore.
classData.name: ignorePatterns_

classData.description: Extensions to explicitly ignore (images, fonts, raw binaries)
classData.name: ignoreExts_

classData.description: Executes the recursive file system sync into the native Graph database.
classData.name: syncWorkspaceToGraph

classData.comment:
/**
     * Recursive folder iteration mapping directly to GraphService endpoints.
     * @param {String} dir Current directory path
     * @param {String} rootDir The base root path determining relative node ids natively
     * @param {String|null} parentId Graph ID of the parent directory Node
     * @param {Object} stats Reference counter
     * @param {Map} mtimeMap Precaching SQLite map
     * @param {Map} hashMap Precaching SQLite hash map
     */
classData.description: Recursive folder iteration mapping directly to GraphService endpoints.

params.description: The base root path determining relative node ids natively
params.name: rootDir

params.description: Graph ID of the parent directory Node
params.name: parentId

classData.name: walkDirectory
